---
title: "Hospital Critical Care Capacity in France"
description: "evolution of critical care bed capacity in French hospitals between 2013 and 2024, using open data published by the DREES (Direction de la recherche, des études, de l'évaluation et des statistiques), the French Ministry of Health's statistical department."
date: 2024-12-01
categories: [Information Systems, Healthcare, IT, Python]
image: ../images/python_analysis.png
---
